headline: Jim Cramer Says “PG&E Is a Great Growth Story”
summary: PG&E Corporation (NYSE:PCG) was among Jim Cramer’s latest stock calls, as he suggested investors balance portfolios with hot and cold stocks. Discussing the company’s recently reported quarterly results, Cramer said: It is a great time to be an electric utility, thanks to the surging power demand from all these new data centers. But some of […]
